sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The player is now at rows 28-31, cols 20-27. It moved DOWN once (from rows 24-27 to rows 28-31), but the second DOWN was blocked. The player is at the same row range as target 2 (rows 28-31). Target 2 is at cols 16-19, player is at cols 20-27. They're adjacent horizontally.
The player is facing right (W on right). Target 2 is to the left, so it doesn't turn G. Target 3 is at rows 32-35, cols 20-23, below the player.
The second DOWN was blocked because the player would overlap with target 3 (player at rows 32-35, cols 20-27 would overlap with target 3 at rows 32-35, cols 20-23).
Now the player is at rows 28-31, cols 20-27, facing right. Target 2 is to the left at cols 16-19. To activate target 2, I need to face left. To face left, I need to move LEFT. But moving LEFT would put the player at rows 28-31, cols 16-23, which overlaps with target 2 at cols 16-19.
Wait, but the player just moved DOWN to rows 28-31, cols 20-27, which is the same row range as target 2. The columns don't overlap (20-27 vs 16-19), so the move was allowed. But moving LEFT would put the player at cols 16-23, which overlaps with target 2's cols 16-19. So the move is blocked.
Hmm, I'm stuck again. The player can't move LEFT (overlaps target 2), can't move DOWN (overlaps target 3), and moving RIGHT or UP just moves away from the targets.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe I need to use SPACE while adjacent to a target, even if it's not G. Let me try pressing SPACE while the player is adjacent to target 2 (from the right).
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the game mechanics. When the player was 4x4, the sequence was:
1. Move adjacent to target, facing it → target turns G
2. Press SPACE → target is destroyed, player absorbs it
But now the player is 4x8 and can't face the targets properly. Maybe there's a different mechanic I'm missing.
Let me try pressing SPACE while adjacent to target 2 and see what happens.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at rows 28-31, cols 20-27, facing right
# Target 2 at rows 28-31, cols 16-19 (adjacent to player's left)
# Target 3 at rows 32-35, cols 20-23 (below player)
# Player can't move LEFT (overlaps target 2) or DOWN (overlaps target 3)
# Try pressing SPACE while adjacent to target 2
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
